query:
SELECT id, name, status, currentStep, 
  JSON_LENGTH(briefingStructured->'$.inconsistencias') as num_inconsistencias,
  JSON_EXTRACT(briefingStructured, '$.inconsistencias[0].pergunta') as primeira_inconsistencia
FROM projects 
WHERE briefingStructured IS NOT NULL 
  AND JSON_LENGTH(briefingStructured->'$.inconsistencias') > 0
ORDER BY updatedAt DESC
LIMIT 5;

FROM projects

  AND JSON_LENGTH(briefingStructured->'$.inconsistencias') > 0
